hero.subtitle: Your personal companion knows the Bible – and asks the right questions. Not a person, but an honest companion. For meaningful conversations, deep questions, and real impulses.
hero.quote: "Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest."

impulse.label: Impulse of the Day
impulse.deepDive: What does this mean for me?
impulse.deepDivePrompt: The daily impulse is "{{topic}}" with {{reference}}. Explain this passage: Who wrote it? In what situation? What comes before and after? And what does it mean for my life today?
impulse.explorePrompt: Read me the full passage around {{reference}} and explain the context. I want to understand the story behind it.

features.sectionSubtitle: Discover the many ways your personal companion can support you

bible.title: Bible passages & interpretation
bible.desc: Ask "What does the Bible say about...?" and receive relevant verses with context and clear explanation.

goals.title: Life planning & goals
goals.desc: Discover your calling, set concrete goals, and find out what God might have in store for you.

self.title: Finding yourself
self.desc: Recognize your gifts, strengths, and longings – and what your heart truly needs.

faith.title: Faith journey & finding Christ
faith.desc: Whether seeking, doubting, or deepening – your companion accompanies you on your personal path.

daily.title: Daily impulses & church year
daily.desc: Start your day with impulses and let your companion guide you through Advent, Lent, and holidays.

groups.title: Groups & communities
groups.desc: Perfect for Bible study groups, church communities, and shared devotions.

coaching.title: Not just a chat – genuine companionship
coaching.subtitle: Your companion combines biblical wisdom with proven coaching methods and Positive Psychology.
coaching.journeyDesc: Your companion accompanies you as long as you wish – in free conversation or with an optional 21-day structure.
coaching.week1Desc: Building trust, listening, understanding your situation. Where are you? What concerns you?
coaching.week2Desc: Recognizing patterns, clarifying desires, deepening biblical impulses. What do you really want?
coaching.week3Desc: Taking concrete steps, setting goals, initiating change. What's your next step?
coaching.openQuestionsTitle: Open questions instead of quick answers
coaching.openQuestionsDesc: Your companion doesn't give cheap advice. Instead, it asks the questions that truly matter:
coaching.openQ2: "How would you know something has changed?"
coaching.openQ3: "What would be a first small step?"
coaching.honestDesc: No "It'll be fine!" and no sugarcoating. Your companion is empathetic AND honest:
coaching.renameTip: 💡 You can give your your companion a personal name – so it truly becomes your companion.

discover.title: Rediscover faith – without pressure
discover.subtitle: More and more people are asking the big questions anew. BibleBot.Life is for everyone who wants to (re)discover faith – honestly, without pathos, and without church jargon.

doubt.title: You doubt?
doubt.text: Good. Doubt isn't a flaw – it's the beginning of honest faith. The Bible is full of people who wrestled.

search.title: You're searching?
search.text: Maybe you don't even know what for. That's perfectly fine. Your companion helps you ask the right questions – instead of delivering quick answers.

deepen.title: You want to go deeper?
deepen.text: You already believe, but want to understand more? Discover the depth of the Bible – historical, personal, surprisingly relevant.

discover.quote: "Ask, and it will be given to you; seek, and you will find; knock, and the door will be opened."
discover.quoteText: Many of us don't talk much about faith. That's okay. But those with questions deserve honest answers – without sermons, without membership, without ulterior motives.

subscribe.title: Daily Bible impulse
subscribe.subtitle: Every morning at 7:00 AM – a verse, a thought, a good start.
subscribe.firstNameHint: So we can greet you personally.
subscribe.channelLabel: How would you like to receive the impulse?
subscribe.phoneHint: With country code, e.g. +1 for the US.

subscribe.pushHint: After clicking "Subscribe", your browser will ask for notification permission. Please allow it to receive the impulse.

subscribe.toastTelegramDesc: Start your companion and type /daily to activate the daily impulse.
subscribe.toastSuccessDesc: You'll receive your daily impulse starting tomorrow.

subscribe.toastPermDeniedDesc: Please allow notifications in your browser settings.
subscribe.unsubscribedDesc: You will no longer receive daily inspiration.

faq.title: What you should know
faq.subtitle: Transparency matters – especially for theologians, pastors, and critical thinkers.
faq.q1: What makes this different from ChatGPT & Co.?
q1BotItems: Promotes critical thinking as faith maturity
faq.q2Intro: Your companion works ecumenically with the major German-language Bible editions:
faq.q2Outro: All Bible passages include source citations and historical context.
faq.q3: What scientific foundations are behind it?
faq.q3Intro: The companionship is based on peer-reviewed research in Positive Psychology:
faq.q4: How does your companion ensure pastoral safety?
q4Items: Suicidal thoughts or crisis → immediate referral to emergency helplines
Respect without arbitrariness – clear biblical positions are taken
Empathy AND honesty – uncomfortable topics are addressed
Follow-up questions for self-reflection instead of cheap validation
No toxic positivity – genuine, honest companionship
Openly names tensions and difficult texts
faq.q5: Is your companion tied to a specific denomination?
faq.q5Answer: No. Your companion is ecumenically oriented and respects Reformed, Catholic, Free Church, and other Christian traditions equally. When there are denominational differences in interpretation, various perspectives are presented transparently – without favoring any tradition.
faq.q6: Does your companion replace pastoral care or therapy?
faq.q6Answer: No. Your companion is a digital tool for personal Bible reading and reflection. It does not replace professional pastoral care, theological counseling, or psychological therapy. In serious crises, your companion always refers to qualified resources.
faq.q7Answer: No. Your companion comforts where comfort is needed – but it also challenges. Spiritual growth requires friction. Your companion asks uncomfortable follow-up questions, names difficult Bible texts (Job, Lament Psalms, prophetic criticism), and doesn't shy away from topics like justice, repentance, and responsibility. The prophetic tradition was never comfortable – and neither is this tool.
faq.q8: Who is behind BibleBot.Life and how is it funded?
faq.q8Answer: BibleBot.Life is a private, non-commercial project. It's run on a volunteer basis and funded exclusively through voluntary donations. There's no advertising, no data sales, and no paid features. All donations go directly to covering operating costs (infrastructure, hosting, development). Since your companion is a private project, donations are not tax-deductible.
faq.q9: How does your companion handle my data?
faq.q9Answer: Your companion stores no personal data and no chat histories. Every conversation is anonymous. There's no login, no tracking, and no sharing of data with third parties. Usage is completely anonymous.

donate.title: Help keep your companion free
donate.subtitle: BibleBot.Life is a charitable project promoting free access to biblical knowledge and spiritual guidance. Your donation helps keep this service free, ad-free, and accessible to everyone worldwide.
donate.note: BibleBot.Life is operated by a charitable association. Donations may be tax-deductible depending on your jurisdiction.
donate.secureNote: Write to us — we will arrange everything.
donate.purposeItem3: Global distribution and translations in over 35 languages

cta.title: You don't have to go through this alone
cta.subtitle: Just share what's on your mind. No login, no cost, no judgment – just honest companionship and the wisdom of the Bible.

footer.tagline: Your personal companion — with the depth of the Bible, no prior knowledge needed.
footer.disclaimer: BibleBot.Life is a digital tool and does not replace professional pastoral care, theological counseling, or psychological therapy. In acute crises, please contact your local emergency helpline.
footer.love: With ❤️ for everyone wondering what Christ thinks.

chat.welcome:
Welcome! 🤗

I'm your personal companion with the Bible, good questions, and real impulses. No pressure, no judgment.

You can ask me anything – or just share what's on your mind. 💛
chat.journeyOffer:
💡 **Tip:** I also offer a **21-day journey** – 3 weeks of daily impulses, reflections, and concrete steps. At your own pace.

Would you like to try it?

tiles.sectionSubtitle: Choose a topic — your companion walks with you

Hi!

I wanted to show you BibleBot.Life – a free Bible companion that really knows the Bible. No sign-up needed, completely anonymous.

It asks thoughtful questions, explains Bible passages in context and accompanies you honestly – even on difficult topics.

Try it out: https://bibelbot.ch?utm_source=refer&utm_medium=email

Best wishes

chatDemo.sectionLabel: Here's what a conversation looks like
chatDemo.userMsg: I feel alone. What does the Bible say about that?
chatDemo.botMsg: You are not alone – even when it feels that way. Psalm 23 says: 'The Lord is my shepherd, I shall not want.' This means that God is near you, even in the darkest moments. Would you like us to explore this passage together?

suggest.psalm23: Psalm 23 – The Lord is my shepherd
suggest.joh316: John 3:16 – For God so loved the world
suggest.rom828: Romans 8:28 – All things work together for good
suggest.mt1128: Matthew 11:28 – Come to me, all who are weary
suggest.phil413: Philippians 4:13 – I can do all things
suggest.jes4110: Isaiah 41:10 – Fear not, for I am with you
suggest.ps462: Psalm 46:1 – God is our refuge and strength

dailyVerses.v0: "Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest."
dailyVerses.v1: "For I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord, plans for peace."
dailyVerses.v2: "Fear not, for I am with you; be not dismayed, for I am your God."
dailyVerses.v3: "The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want."
dailyVerses.v4: "Cast all your anxiety on him because he cares for you."
dailyVerses.v5: "I am the light of the world. Whoever follows me will not walk in darkness."
dailyVerses.v6: "Be strong and courageous! Do not be afraid, for the Lord your God is with you."
dailyVerses.v7: "But those who hope in the Lord will renew their strength; they will soar on wings like eagles."
dailyVerses.v8: "For where two or three gather in my name, there am I with them."
dailyVerses.v9: "Taste and see that the Lord is good; blessed is the one who takes refuge in him."
dailyVerses.v10: "He heals the brokenhearted and binds up their wounds."
dailyVerses.v11: "Love is patient, love is kind. It bears all things, believes all things, hopes all things."
dailyVerses.v12: "Be joyful in hope, patient in affliction, faithful in prayer."
dailyVerses.v13: "Trust in the Lord with all your heart and lean not on your own understanding."

verseExplain: Explain this Bible verse in detail: {{quote}} ({{ref}}) – Who wrote this? In what context? What does it mean for my life today?

celebrants.heroSubtitle: From the first voice note to the finished session — plan, document, and conduct ceremonies and coaching sessions with a single tool.
celebrants.pain1: Hours of preparation for every single ceremony?
celebrants.pain2: Paper notes missing at the most important moment?
celebrants.pain3: No system for songs, readings, and order of service?
celebrants.pain4: Difficult to coordinate with musicians and helpers?
celebrants.featuresSubtitle: A thoughtful system for the entire workflow — from preparation to execution.
celebrants.f1Desc: Record conversations, get automatic transcriptions — the foundation for moving ceremony texts.
celebrants.f2Desc: From your notes and transcripts, create empathetic speeches, coaching summaries, or reflection texts.
celebrants.f3Desc: Export finished texts as PDF or share via link directly with clients, relatives, and participants.
celebrants.f4Desc: Pre-built workflow templates for Catholic, Reformed, Lutheran, Evangelical, and Secular — ready to use.
celebrants.f5Desc: All ceremonies at a glance: monthly, weekly, and daily views. Never lose track again.
celebrants.f6Desc: Live mode for execution: go through the service block by block, read texts, see music cues — distraction-free.
celebrants.f7Desc: Integrate songs and music pieces directly into the order of service. The Conductor Mode shows you when each piece plays.
celebrants.f8Desc: Involve musicians, lectors, technicians. Assign roles, check availability, plan together.
celebrants.f9Desc: Songs, prayers, readings, and liturgical texts — searchable, tagged, growing with every ceremony.
celebrants.f10Desc: Neatly document baptisms, weddings, and funerals. All data in one place.
celebrants.pricingSubtitle: Start for free. All Pro features are made possible through sponsorship.
celebrants.faq1a: For chaplains, life coaches, freelance funeral speakers, wedding celebrants, hospital chaplains, pastors, and anyone who prepares and conducts ceremonies, workshops, or coaching sessions.
celebrants.faq2a: Yes. All data is encrypted and stored in Switzerland. Only you have access to your content.
celebrants.faq3a: The interface is available in 36 languages. Texts can be created in any language.
celebrants.faq4q: Can I use Conductor Mode on a tablet?
celebrants.faq4a: Yes! The entire app is optimized as a PWA for mobile — perfect on a tablet at the lectern.
celebrants.faq5a: No. The interface is intuitive and designed for people who want to focus on content — not technology.
celebrants.ctaBottomSub: Start for free — no credit card required.
celebrants.seoTitle: BibleBot.Life for Chaplains & Life Coaches — Plan Ceremonies & Sessions
celebrants.seoDesc: Plan funerals, weddings, coaching sessions professionally: voice recording, text generation, teleprompter, calendar, and collaboration.

labels.sevenwhys: Why do I really do this?
labels.lifewheel: Where do I stand in life?

qa.title: QA-verified
qa.text: Every Bible citation is automatically checked for accuracy — in every conversation.

noAds.title: No advertising
noAds.text: No tracking, no data sharing, no monetization of your questions.

noExpertise.title: No prior knowledge needed
noExpertise.text: You don't need church membership or theological expertise.

tools.title: Tools that go deeper
tools.subtitle: For moments when you need more than just an answer.

lifewheel.title: Life Wheel Check
lifewheel.desc: How are things with work, relationships, purpose, and health? The Life Wheel helps you gain clarity in 3 minutes — and shows where the Bible connects directly.

sevenwhys.title: The 7-Why Method
sevenwhys.desc: Why do I really do this? Why does it feel this way? Your companion guides you through 7 questions that get to the root — with biblical context at the deepest point.

gratitude.title: Gratitude Journal
gratitude.desc: Name three things you're grateful for today — and BibleBot finds matching Psalms and verses. A daily ritual that shifts your perspective.

lectio.title: Lectio Divina
lectio.desc: Guided meditative Bible reading in four steps: Read, Meditate, Pray, Rest. A centuries-old practice, freshly accompanied.

forgiveness.title: Forgiveness Letter
forgiveness.desc: BibleBot guides you through writing a forgiveness letter — step by step, with biblical impulses and without pressure.

values.title: Values Compass
values.desc: What truly matters to you in life? Discover your core values — and what the Bible says about them. Clarity in 5 minutes.

examen.title: Examen (Ignatius)
examen.desc: The proven daily review by Ignatius of Loyola: Reflect on your day in 5 steps — gratitude, review, what touched or burdened you, and a prayer for tomorrow.

tools.favoriteTip: Click the star to save your favorite tools for quick access

personal.title: I'm looking for personal companionship
personal.desc: Questions about faith, daily impulses, spiritual growth — at your own pace and without judgment.

church.title: I plan services & accompany people
church.desc: For pastors, chaplains, and church teams: support for sermon preparation, team planning, and more.

faithPsych.q: Does BibleBot combine faith and psychology?
faithPsych.a: BibleBot combines biblical wisdom with insights from evidence-based psychology — not to psychologize faith, but to make it practical for everyday life. The methods (PERMA, logotherapy, gratitude and forgiveness research) complement the Bible, but don't replace it.
